title: CT7 static tactic graph — Exchange trichotomy
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT7 (Exchange trichotomy). It requires the complete 20-node array in fixed source order from CT7.N01 through CT7.N20, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT7 (Exchange trichotomy) tactic specification; must equal "CT7".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N01, "Definition — bounded exchange pair A≤ftrightarrow A' with common interface", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N01, "Definition — bounded exchange pair A≤ftrightarrow A' with common interface"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N01, "Definition — bounded exchange pair A≤ftrightarrow A' with common interface"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N02, "Lemma — does a compatible context realize T?", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N02, "Lemma — does a compatible context realize T?"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N02, "Lemma — does a compatible context realize T?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N03, "C1 — direct target hit", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N03, "C1 — direct target hit"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N03, "C1 — direct target hit"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N04, "Lemma — does a context distinguish A from A'?", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N04, "Lemma — does a context distinguish A from A'?"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N04, "Lemma — does a context distinguish A from A'?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N05, "Routing theorem — which defect payload is certified?", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N05, "Routing theorem — which defect payload is certified?"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N05, "Routing theorem — which defect payload is certified?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N06, "C3 — defect account already routed", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N06, "C3 — defect account already routed"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N06, "C3 — defect account already routed"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N07, "Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N07, "Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N07, "Payload lemma — build P_7→3 — external-type defect"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N08, "CT 3 — external types", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N08, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N08, "CT 3 — external types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_7→12 — load plus measure", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_7→12 — load plus measure"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N09, "Payload lemma — build P_7→12 — load plus measure"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N10, "CT 12 — peeling loop", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N10, "CT 12 — peeling loop"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N10, "CT 12 — peeling loop"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N11, "Lemma — same response in all contexts and smaller representative?", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N11, "Lemma — same response in all contexts and smaller representative?"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N11, "Lemma — same response in all contexts and smaller representative?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N12, "Scope candidate — no finite context generator — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N13, "Lemma — target-equivalent compression"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N15, "Payload record — neutral noncompressive exchange"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N16, "Routing theorem — what neutral datum remains?"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N16, "Routing theorem — what neutral datum remains?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_7→10 — neutral label"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N18, "Payload lemma — build P_7→16 — whole-object data"; must equal the integer 18.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N19, "CT 10 — refinement"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT7.N20, "CT 16 — whole-object types", in CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must equal "CT7.N20".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT7.N20, "CT 16 — whole-object types"; must equal the integer 20.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT7.N20, "CT 16 — whole-object types"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT7 (Exchange trichotomy); must contain exactly 20 generic node objects in source order from CT7.N01 through CT7.N20, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
